extraction.one_line_summary: VIVIANI Elia won from 25th position with 800m to go, threading through chaos while Quick-Step had a 'mini crisis' with positioning
tactical_patterns: Quick-Step committed sprinter too deep despite leadout chaos, Viviani recovered from 25th wheel at 800m successfully.
DENNIS Rowan took intermediate sprint for time bonus specifically to secure pink jersey before stage finish.
Spectator wall allegedly provided aero assistance to breakaway rider, highlighting security/positioning issues on Israeli stages.

rider_signals.VIVIANI Elia: positive: recovered from catastrophic positioning (25th at 800m) to win, suggesting superior top-end speed compensates for positioning errors
rider_signals.BENNETT Sam: neutral: confirmed pre-stage that team wouldn't dedicate full support, finished third without full leadout commitment
rider_signals.DENNIS Rowan: positive: tactically hunted intermediate sprint time bonus to secure GC lead, showing calculated GC awareness on sprint stage
rider_signals.CAVENDISH Mark: negative: dropped before finale despite Dimension Data controlling, signaling declining form or team communication breakdown
